caption: Wheeling (circumductio): a new orderable maneuver. Press C (wheel right) or Z (wheel left) with a unit selected and one flank file plants and holds while the rest of the block swings around it like a door on a hinge — the line ends up facing a new bearing and lying along a new line, every man still in his rank and file. Distinct from the quarter-turn (facing changes in place, block stays put) and the centre pivot (both flanks sweep about the middle). Watch the near flank hold while the far flank marches a wide arc.
